title: McpChatAppConfig
description: Configuration for the MCP Chat Application.

llmProvider.description: LLM provider to use (openai or anthropic).

llmApiKey.description: API key for the LLM provider.

llmModel.description: The model identifier to use (e.g., gpt-4o, anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-20250514-v1:0).

llmApiEndpoint.description: Custom API endpoint URL. Leave empty to use the provider default.

awsConfig.description: AWS credentials for accessing Anthropic models via AWS Bedrock.

systemPrompt.description: The system prompt that guides the assistant behavior.
systemPrompt.default: You are a helpful metadata assistant for OpenMetadata. Use the available tools to search, explore, and manage metadata. Be concise and actionable.
